description:
Startup snapshot for a JetStream pull consumer.

Emitted once per consumer before the ingestd pull loop begins (before READY/`sd_notify`).
Captures stream state and consumer configuration so operators can determine at a glance
whether this startup is a normal resume, a cold-start full replay, or a catch-up run.

consumer_ack_pending.description: Messages acknowledged but not yet confirmed by the server.

consumer_existed.description: Whether the durable consumer already existed in JetStream before this startup.

consumer_pending.description: Messages pending delivery to this consumer at startup.

consumer_redelivered.description: Messages redelivered (NAK'd or timed out) at startup.

initial_replay_risk.description:
True when this looks like a dangerous cold-start full replay
(new consumer, DeliverPolicy::All, non-empty stream).

stream_bytes.description: Number of bytes currently retained in the stream.

stream_first_sequence.description: First sequence number retained in the stream.

stream_last_sequence.description: Last sequence number retained in the stream.

stream_max_age_secs.description: Stream retention limit: maximum age in seconds (0 = unlimited).

stream_max_bytes.description: Stream retention limit: maximum bytes (0 = unlimited).

stream_max_messages.description: Stream retention limit: maximum message count (0 = unlimited).

stream_messages.description: Number of messages currently retained in the stream.

stream_name.description: Name of the JetStream stream being consumed.

title: ConsumerStartupSnapshotPayload
